monday.description: Pan-seared beef stew meat is combined with gluten-free meat tortellini, organic arugula, and reduced-sodium black vinegar, tied together by a quick sauté.

tuesday.description: Grilled albacore tuna is served atop whole grain mochi rice, sautéed maitake mushrooms, and finished with a dollop of low-fat coffee yogurt.

wednesday.description: Crispy organic chicken skin is paired with toasted barbari bread, mashed avocados, and a pat of smen.

thursday.description: Slow-cooked free-range ground chicken is mixed with cracked wheat, steamed hijiki, and seasoned with peri peri seasoning.

friday.description: Sea urchin is tossed with gluten-free egg noodles, sliced cucumbers, and sprinkled with ground cubeb pepper.

monday.description: Organic hard-boiled eggs are tossed with wide rice noodles, sautéed fresh straw mushrooms, and moistened with vegetable stock.

tuesday.description: Pan-seared free-range duck eggs are served with toasted gluten-free pumpernickel, roasted organic acorn squash, and topped with organic goat butter.

wednesday.description: Organic century eggs are paired with quick-cook carnaroli rice, steamed butternut squash, and seasoned with onion powder.

thursday.description: Grated jarlsberg is mixed with hokkien noodles, sliced radishes, and sprinkled with garam masala.

friday.description: Organic salted duck eggs are served atop whole grain quinoa, roasted sweet potatoes, and finished with a drizzle of cold-pressed almond oil.
